---
title: "BA szakdolgozat"
author: "Stróbl Anita"
date: "Last compiled on `r format(Sys.time(), '%d/%m/%Y, %X %Z')`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 5
    code_folding: hide
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

options(scipen = 999)

library(psych)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(broom)
library(lavaan)
library(sjPlot)
library(car)
library(data.table)
library(tibble)
library(lubridate)
library(naniar)
library(hms)
library(skimr)
library(ggplot2)
library(janitor)
library(scales) 
library(FSA)
library(PMCMRplus)
library(lsr)
library(misty)
library(rstatix)
library(see)
library(gridExtra)

```

```{r import_dataset}

dat_1 <- read.csv("dat_1.csv")

```

``` {r sex_edu_factor}

# Making sex variable considered as a factor
dat_1  <-  
  dat_1 %>%
  mutate(sex = factor(sex, levels = c(1, 2, 3), labels = c("Female", "Male", "Other")))

# Making edu variable consideres as a factor
dat_1  <-  dat_1 %>%
  mutate(edu = factor(edu, levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7), 
                      labels = c("Általános iskola vagy alacsonyabb (1)",
                                 "Középiskola érettségi nélkül (2)", 
                                 "Középiskola érettségivel (3)",
                                 "Egyetemi alap diploma (4)",
                                 "Egyetemi mester diploma (5)",
                                 "Doktori fokozat (PhD) (6)", 
                                 "Egyéb (7)")))

```

``` {r demography}

# Creating distinct data
dat_distinct <- dat_1 %>%
  distinct(id_esm, .keep_all = TRUE)

dat_ditinct_dem <- dat_distinct %>%
  select(id_esm, age, sex, edu)

# Creating demography tibble
summary_dem <- dat_ditinct_dem %>% 
  summarize(n=n(), 
            age_mean=mean(age), age_sd=sd(age),  age_mdn=median(age), 
            age_min=min(age), age_max=max(age),
            n_female=sum(sex=="Female", na.rm = T),
            female_pct=100/n*sum(sex=="Female", na.rm = T),
            n_male=sum(sex=="Male", na.rm = T),
            male_pct=100/n*sum(sex=="Male", na.rm = T),
            n_other=sum(sex=="Other", na.rm = T), 
            edu_1_pct=(sum(edu=="Általános iskola vagy alacsonyabb (1)", na.rm=T)/n())*100, 
            n_edu_1=(sum(edu=="Általános iskola vagy alacsonyabb (1)", na.rm=T)),
            edu_2_pct=(sum(edu=="Középiskola érettségi nélkül (2)",na.rm=T)/n())*100,
            n_edu_2=(sum(edu=="Középiskola érettségi nélkül (2)",na.rm=T)),
            edu_3_pct=(sum(edu=="Középiskola érettségivel (3)", na.rm=T)/n())*100, 
            n_edu_3=(sum(edu=="Középiskola érettségivel (3)", na.rm=T)),
            edu_4_pct=(sum(edu=="Egyetemi alap diploma (4)", na.rm=T)/n())*100, 
            n_edu_4=(sum(edu=="Egyetemi alap diploma (4)", na.rm=T)),
            edu_5_pct=(sum(edu=="Egyetemi mester diploma (5)", na.rm=T)/n())*100, 
            n_edu_5=(sum(edu=="Egyetemi mester diploma (5)", na.rm=T)),
            edu_6_pct=(sum(edu=="Doktori fokozat (PhD) (6)", na.rm=T)/n())*100,
            n_edu_6=(sum(edu=="Doktori fokozat (PhD) (6)", na.rm=T)),
            edu_7_pct=(sum(edu== "Egyéb (7)", na.rm=T)/n())*100,
            n_edu_7=(sum(edu== "Egyéb (7)", na.rm=T)))

tibble(summary_dem)

```

``` {r complience}

# Creating distinct data
dat_distinct <- dat_1 %>%
  distinct(id_esm, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Identifying day of quitting
dat_maxday <- dat_1 %>%
  select(id_esm, day, worried) %>%
  filter(!is.na(worried)) %>%
  group_by(id_esm) %>%
  summarise(maxday = max(day))

dat_1 <- dat_1 %>%
  select(-any_of("maxday")) %>%
  left_join(dat_maxday, by = "id_esm")

# Number of days spent in the study
dat_spentday <- dat_1 %>%
  select(id_esm, maxday) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  reframe(N = n(),
          mean_days = mean(maxday, na.rm = T),
          mdn_days = median(maxday, na.rm = T),
          sd_days = sd(maxday, na.rm = T),
          min_days = min(maxday, na.rm = T),
          max_days = max(maxday, na.rm = T))

tibble(dat_spentday)

# Calculating complience rate (percentage)
dat_compl <- dat_1 %>%
  select(id_esm, day, beep, maxday, worried) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(id_esm) %>%
  reframe(compl_n  = sum(!is.na(worried)),
          all_answer = maxday * 8,
          compl_pct = (compl_n / all_answer) * 100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  reframe(N = n(),
          mean_compl = mean(compl_pct, na.rm = T),
          mdn_compl = median(compl_pct, na.rm = T),
          sd_compl = sd(compl_pct, na.rm = T),
          min_compl = min(compl_pct, na.rm = T),
          max_compl = max(compl_pct, na.rm = T))
  
tibble(dat_compl)

# calculating number of surveys completed
dat_compl_n <- dat_1 %>%
  select(id_esm, day, beep, maxday, worried) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(id_esm) %>%
  reframe(compl_n  = sum(!is.na(worried)),
          all_answer = maxday * 8,
          compl_pct = (compl_n / all_answer) * 100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  reframe(N = n(),
          mean_compl = mean(compl_n, na.rm = T),
          mdn_compl = median(compl_n, na.rm = T),
          sd_compl = sd(compl_n, na.rm = T),
          min_compl = min(compl_n, na.rm = T),
          max_compl = max(compl_n, na.rm = T))
  
tibble(dat_compl_n)

#visualizing compliance rate
# visualizing colors: 
# positive: #F9D6AF / #FFC2C2
# negative: #ABDCF5
# dezorganized: #F5C8F8 / #DAD0F5
# anything else: 

``` 

``` {r complience_visualization}

dat_compl_vis <- dat_1 %>%
  select(id_esm, day, beep, maxday, worried) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(id_esm) %>%
  reframe(compl_n  = sum(!is.na(worried)),
          all_answer = maxday * 8,
          compl_pct = (compl_n / all_answer) * 100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  distinct()
  
ggplot(dat_compl_vis) +
  geom_histogram(aes(compl_pct), bins = 40, fill = "#96CDCD") +
  labs(
    x = "Együttműködési ráta (%)",
    y = "Résztvevők száma") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 10))

```

``` {r MSS_descriptive}

# Mutate MSS sum
mssb_items <- list(
  mssb_reverse = c("mss_bh_4", "mss_bh_10", "mss_bh_25", "mss_bh_37"),
  mssb_neg = paste0("mss_bh_", seq(1, 37, by = 3)),
  mssb_pos = paste0("mss_bh_", seq(2, 38, by = 3)),
  mssb_dis = paste0("mss_bh_", seq(3, 36, by = 3))     )

dat_1 <- dat_1 %>% 
  mutate(dat = "dat_1") %>%
  mutate(sch_neg = rowSums(select(., all_of(mssb_items$mssb_neg)), na.rm = T),
        sch_pos = rowSums(select(., all_of(mssb_items$mssb_pos)), na.rm = T),
        sch_dis = rowSums(select(., all_of(mssb_items$mssb_dis)), na.rm = T))

# Creating distinct data
dat_distinct <- dat_1 %>%
  distinct(id_esm, .keep_all = TRUE)

dat_distinct_mss <- dat_distinct %>%
  select(id_esm, sch_neg, sch_pos, sch_dis)

# # Creating MSS descriptive table
summary_mss <- dat_distinct_mss %>% 
  summarize(mean_sch_pos=mean(sch_pos, na.rm=T), 
            sd_sch_pos=sd(sch_pos, na.rm=T), 
            max_sch_pos=max(sch_pos, na.rm=T), 
            min_sch_pos=min(sch_pos, na.rm=T),
            mean_sch_neg=mean(sch_neg, na.rm=T), 
            sd_sch_neg=sd(sch_neg, na.rm=T), 
            max_sch_neg=max(sch_neg, na.rm=T), 
            min_sch_neg=min(sch_neg, na.rm=T),
            mean_sch_dis=mean(sch_dis, na.rm=T), 
            sd_sch_dis=sd(sch_dis, na.rm=T),
            max_sch_dis=max(sch_dis, na.rm=T), 
            min_sch_dis=min(sch_dis, na.rm=T))

tibble(summary_mss)

```

``` {r MSS_visualization}

```
